ANTHROPIC_OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Anthropic OAuth token — run `claude setup-token` in Claude Code to generate one (valid 1 year)

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key (sk-ant-api03-...) — alternative to OAuth token

PROVIDER.description: LLM provider (anthropic, openrouter, openai, gemini, groq, mistral, deepseek, ollama)

TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN.description: Telegram bot token from @BotFather — enables Telegram channel

TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS.description: Comma-separated Telegram user IDs or usernames allowed to chat (e.g. 123456789,myusername). Use * to allow anyone.

ZEROCLAW_MODE.description: Start mode: 'daemon' (gateway + Telegram + scheduler) or 'gateway' (HTTP API only)
